Entity Profile
P

Gwendolyn Nash

Person · First seen 3305-06-22 · 4 mentions
Active: 3305-06-22 → 3309-11-23
Mentions Timeline (4 articles)
3309-11-23
Mining Campaign in LHS 3872 Concludes
Torval Mining Ltd's mining campaign concludes successfully, with Nash analysing the Torval family dynamics and Zemina's potential retirement.
3306-09-14
Prince Harold Duval Assassinated
NMLA terrorists assassinate Prince Harold Duval during an incognito journey to visit his daughter Aisling Duval in Cemiess. A single infiltrator shot the Prince at close range before being killed by guards.
3305-07-06
Further Disorder at Port Isabelle
Freed Imperial slaves continue creating turmoil in Eotienses A 3. The emancipated invade Port Isabelle's spaceport, besiege government buildings, and some beg to be re-enslaved to complete their terms. Welfare resources are overwhelmed.
3305-06-22
Imperial Slaves Stranded
Four thousand forcibly emancipated Imperial slaves are left stranded on Eotienses A 3 without food, shelter or income, sparking a humanitarian crisis in Port Isabelle.
